properties.name: dmx.fun.tx-result.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-configure a TxResult bean. Set to false to disable it entirely.

properties.name: dmx.fun.tx-try.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-configure a TxTry bean. Set to false to disable it entirely.

properties.name: dmx.fun.tx-validated.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-configure a TxValidated bean. Set to false to disable it entirely.

properties.name: dmx.fun.aspect.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-configure the DmxTransactionalAspect bean. Set to false to disable @TransactionalResult, @TransactionalTry, and @TransactionalValidated AOP support entirely.

properties.name: dmx.fun.mvc.option-handler.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-configure the Spring MVC Option return-value handler. Set to false to disable Option.some() -> 200 / Option.none() -> 404 mapping.

properties.name: dmx.fun.mvc.result-handler.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-configure the Spring MVC Result/Validated/Try return-value handler. Set to false to disable success -> 200 and error/failure -> 500 mapping.

properties.name: dmx.fun.tracing.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-configure a DmxTracing bean. Set to false to disable automatic distributed tracing span instrumentation for Try and Result operations.

properties.name: dmx.fun.observation.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-configure a DmxObservation bean. When enabled, registers Micrometer Observation instrumentation for Try and Result operations (timers and low-cardinality tags are always recorded; distributed tracing spans are emitted only if a tracing bridge and matching ObservationHandler are configured). Set to false to disable this instrumentation entirely.

properties.name: dmx.fun.webflux.problem.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-configure a default WebFlux ThrowableHttpMapper that renders failures as an RFC 7807 application/problem+json response. Set to false to skip registering the default; a user-declared ThrowableHttpMapper bean also disables it.

properties.name: dmx.fun.webflux.problem.status
properties.description: HTTP status code for the auto-configured default WebFlux ProblemDetail ThrowableHttpMapper. Must be a valid HTTP status code; an unknown value fails startup with a clear message.
